case_title: ALEX EDWARDS ET AL VS. JAMES A. WILHELM ET AL

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO COLEMAN MESHACK BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-15-2015 AT 1:30 PM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES A. WILHELM (CEO) SP PLUS CORP. WAS PRESENT AND WAS REPRESENTED BY JASON FINCH--SENIOR VICE PRESIDENT AND AGNES WONG--EMPLOYEE/ H. R. MANAGER. DEFENDANT EDWARD RUST JR. WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY TAMARA GOLDEN--STATE FARM; SHE WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT COLEMAN MESHACK APPEARED BY COURT CALL. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, ALEX EDWARDS, ELLEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILHELM, JAMES A. (CEO) SP PLUS CORPORAION RUST JR., EDWARD B. CEO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT COLEMAN MESHACK IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED BY DEFENDANT EDWARD RUST JR. REPRESENTATIVE TAMARA GOLDEN--STATE FARM AS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT AT THE HEARING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT JANES A WILHELM RETURNED=RETURN TO SENDER, VACANT, UNABLE TO FORWARD
